subcodes.first_line: O ye souls who are attracted by the divine fragrances! This is the age of the one true Lord, and this is the era of His Most Great Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس منجذبه بنفحات الله کور کور خداوند یکتاست و عصر عصر حضرت کبریاء جسم
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
